description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.0.0 Docker image with a single stage named deployExtension. Add a before_script that runs yarn to install Node dependencies. Define a deployExtension job that runs only on the master branch, belongs to the deployExtension stage, and executes the exact commands: npm run build; mv -v web-ext-artifacts/*.zip extension.zip; CLIENT_ID=${CLIENT_ID} CLIENT_SECRET=${CLIENT_SECRET} EXTENSION_ID=${EXTENSION_ID} REFRESH_TOKEN=${REFRESH_TOKEN} node ./.deploytoChromeStore.js; node ./.deploytoAMO.js firefox ., which publishes the built extension to the Chrome Web Store and Firefox AMO using the referenced environment variables.
